'''鈭歡-b-zh-z''' ('''kagabzhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceilidh|ceilidh]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-zh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceilidh|ceilidh]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-b-zh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kagabzhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabzhezoko|thigabzhezoko]] || [[word:jigabzhezoko|jigabzhezoko]] || [[word:shigabzhezoko|shigabzhezoko]] || [[word:kigabzhezoko|kigabzhezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabzhezoko|thuthugabzhezoko]] || [[word:jujugabzhezoko|jujugabzhezoko]] || [[word:shushugabzhezoko|shushugabzhezoko]] || [[word:kukugabzhezoko|kukugabzhezoko]]
|-

|-

|-
